HEADER.TITLE: ContentCraft AI
HEADER.SUBTITLE: Generate AI-powered content with Amazon Bedrock

FOOTER.POWERED_BY: Powered by Amazon Bedrock and AWS Amplify

SIGN_UP.TITLE: Create Account
SIGN_UP.PASSWORD_REQUIREMENTS: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

CONFIRM.TITLE: Verify Your Account
CONFIRM.INSTRUCTIONS: We've sent a verification code to your email. Please enter the code below to verify your account.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset Password
FORGOT_PASSWORD.INSTRUCTIONS: Enter your username and we'll send a password reset code to your email.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.CODE_SENT: We've sent a code to your email. Please enter the code and your new password below.

ERROR.USER_NOT_CONFIRMED: User is not confirmed. Please verify your account.
ERROR.SIGN_IN_FAILED: Sign in failed. Please try again.
ERROR.SIGN_UP_FAILED: Sign up failed. Please try again.
ERROR.CONFIRM_SIGN_UP_FAILED: Account verification failed. Please try again.
ERROR.FORGOT_PASSWORD_FAILED: Failed to send reset code. Please try again.
ERROR.PASSWORD_RESET_FAILED: Password reset failed. Please try again.
ERROR.SIGN_OUT_FAILED: Sign out failed. Please try again.

LEGAL.TERMS_NOTICE: By using this application, you agree to the following:

SINGLE_CLIP.TITLE: Generate Single Clip
SINGLE_CLIP.SCRIPT_PLACEHOLDER: Describe what you want to see in the video...

AUTOMATED_MULTI_CLIP.TITLE: Generate Automated Multi-Clip
AUTOMATED_MULTI_CLIP.SCRIPT_PLACEHOLDER: Describe the overall story or sequence...

ERROR.MIN_DURATION: Duration must be at least 12 seconds
ERROR.MIN_SHOTS: At least one shot is required
ERROR.SHOT_SCRIPT_REQUIRED: Script is required for all shots
ERROR.IMAGE_SIZE: Image size exceeds the maximum allowed (5MB)
ERROR.IMAGE_TYPE: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are supported
ERROR.SUBMISSION_FAILED: Failed to submit job. Please try again.

STATUS.TITLE: Job Status
STATUS.NO_JOB: No active job. Generate a video to see status here.
STATUS.NO_VIDEO_URL: Video URL not found. Please contact support.

JOBS.TITLE: Your Videos
JOBS.NO_JOBS: No videos found. Generate your first video!

EMAIL.TITLE: Email Notifications
EMAIL.DESCRIPTION: Subscribe to receive email notifications when your videos are ready.
EMAIL.SUBSCRIBE_SUCCESS: Successfully subscribed! Please check your email to confirm your subscription.
EMAIL.SUBSCRIBE_ERROR: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.
EMAIL.UNSUBSCRIBE_ERROR: Failed to unsubscribe. Please try again.
